name: State Bank Of India
description_short: State Bank of India is India's largest public sector bank offering personal internet banking services with OTP-based login security and online account management.
description_long: State Bank of India (SBI) is the largest banking institution in India and serves as a major provider of retail banking services. The company operates through a comprehensive network of branches and digital channels, providing essential financial services to millions of customers across the country. Founded as India's premier public sector bank, SBI has established itself as a cornerstone of the Indian financial system for over two centuries. SBI's primary offerings include personal internet banking (OnlineSBI) with secure login capabilities, account management, and digital financial services. The website prominently features their Personal Banking portal, which allows customers to access their accounts remotely through a secure HTTPS connection. The platform emphasizes OTP-based authentication and mandatory password changes to ensure account security. Customers can manage their accounts, perform transactions, and access banking services through the online portal available in both English and Hindi languages. SBI distinguishes itself through its extensive branch network, government-backed stability as India's largest public sector bank, and commitment to security measures including OTP-based login, SSL encryption, and phishing awareness campaigns. The bank explicitly educates customers about fraud prevention, requiring verification of security certificates and providing dedicated channels for reporting phishing attempts (report.phishing@sbi.co.in). The platform includes features like account locking/unlocking capabilities and a virtual keyboard option for enhanced security during login. Prospective customers should visit full banking portals or branch locations for complete details on savings accounts, loans, credit products, investment services, and other offerings. The emphasis on security features reflects the bank's awareness of digital banking risks but limits visibility into the full range of available products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Internet Banking (OnlineSBI) with secure login
Virtual Keyboard for secure password entry
Phishing attack reporting and fraud prevention
Profile password management with mandatory periodic changes
pros: OTP-based login system with mandatory password changes every 180 days for added security
SSL encryption with Extended Validation certificates and HTTPS security protocol
Bilingual platform supporting both English and Hindi languages
Account lock/unlock functionality available through 'Lock & Unlock User' feature
Dedicated phishing reporting system at report.phishing@sbi.co.in for fraud prevention
Virtual Keyboard option for enhanced security during login process
Extensive security awareness education including malware protection and password management guidance
cons: Website content focuses primarily on login and security rather than showcasing actual products and services
No pricing information, interest rates, or fee structures visible on the login portal
Limited information about account types, loans, credit cards, or investment products available
Mandatory profile password change requirement every 365 days may be inconvenient for some users
No information about customer support channels, contact methods, or service hours provided on this page

contact.address: 19 S La Salle St Fl 2, Chicago, IL 60603

best_for: Indian retail customers seeking a government-backed, stable banking institution
Individuals who prioritize security features and fraud prevention in online banking
Hindi-speaking customers who benefit from bilingual banking platform support
diagnosis: State Bank of India is best for Indian customers seeking a large, government-backed banking institution with strong security infrastructure and extensive branch presence. The main caveat is that this login portal provides limited visibility into SBI's actual products, services, and pricing—customers must access the full banking website or visit branches for comprehensive service details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 19 S La Salle St Fl 2, Chicago, IL 60603
